entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Leaver-Validation Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Employees,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Contractors,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountingGeneral,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountsPayable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountsReceivable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Admins,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AuditMgmt,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=campusAccess,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Compensation,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Contractors,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Employees,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Contractors,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
